title: Much More Than a Shoe - Freddie Gibbs and Mizuno Team Up: A sabukaru Documentary
summary: Far from Gary, Indiana, Freddie Gibbs has built a musical legacy that not only made him a hometown hero but a global superstar. That kind of talent is few and far between. Recognizing that influence, Mizuno, the brand that started humbly in 1906 in Osaka through the Mizuno brothers’ mutual love for Western culture like baseball, chose Gibbs as their first n…
